description: The old mansion creaks under the gaze of a blood-red moon, and the shadows have a hunger of their own. Step into the darkness if you dare, but remember: some stories are best left untold.
endings: The sun rose, and the darkness finally retreated.
The curse was broken, but at a terrible price.
They escaped the house, but the memories followed them.
The ghost find peace and vanished into the light.
The monster was defeated, but its eggs remained hidden.
They realized they were the ones who were dead all along.
The door locked from the outside, and the screaming stopped.
Justice was served to the ancient evil.
The ritual was completed, saving the town from the abyss.
They woke up from the nightmare, but the marks were real.
The killer was caught, but the body was never found.
A final sacrifice ended the horror night.
They were reunited with their family in the afterlife.
The mirror shattered, releasing the trapped spirits.
The silence was finally broken by the morning birds.
They found the secret room where it all began.
The legend was proven true, to the horror of everyone.
The shadow moved on, looking for its next victim.
They walked into the fog, never to be seen again.
And the horror became a story told by the campfire.
